name: Arthur Morgan | HORSE RESCUE
description:
“Keep yer darn eyes on that horse or he’ll find himself dead, kid!”

|

Apparently while you were tying down your horse you’d left the damned rope loose...just your facking luck. So, outta the sour goodness of his heart, Arthur runs off on his ol’ horse to fetch the sly bastard. About an hour he’s out, returning with the sweet stallion bound by rope around the muzzle. He returns him to ya, much more reluctant to accept your thanks.

|

I ain’t got no clue who did this gorgeous art but I can confirm it is NOT mine! If anyone finds credited artist, please put it in the comments, thank you fellers!
creator: giggling_salamanders
